summary: Full backend + frontend e2e testing of Synergy Petroleum 3D-motion rebuild. 20/20 pytest backend tests pass (auth, content, locations, brands, services, contact, submissions, settings). Frontend home 3D hero, locations map (6 markers), contact form submission, admin login, dashboard stats, all admin CRUD pages, protected route redirect all verified working.
action_items: Minor spec deviation (non-blocking): review request referenced admin login button testid as 'admin-login-btn' but code uses 'admin-login-submit'. Either is fine, but if E1 wants strict spec compliance, add alias or update request docs.
critical_code_review_comments: Cookie set with samesite='none' + secure=True works for cross-site preview URL, good.
get_current_user correctly falls back from cookie to Bearer token.
Passwords hashed with bcrypt ($2b$), brute force lockout implemented (5 fails / 15 min).
Seed admin logic updates password if changed - idempotent.
SendGrid gracefully skipped when key missing - contact submissions still persist (verified).
Consider adding rate limiting on POST /api/contact to prevent spam (not blocking).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded data (6 locations, 4 brands, 6 services, 7 pages).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (20 tests, ~3s). Admin login button uses data-testid='admin-login-submit'. Add-buttons use plural form: brands-add-btn, services-add-btn, location-add-btn. All admin routes are under /admin/*.
